data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — SKILL.md lines 596-608 show Primary=orchestrator signal, Fallback=Agent tool (need to swap). suite-engine RED zone requires SUITE_TEST_INDEX env; run-hook-tests.sh doesn't set it. Fix: add SUITE_TEST_INDEX auto-set to run-hook-tests.sh + RED marker to .test-index.
